chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No. S-223 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 01.09.2025 Miss. Farzana Bhatti, Advocate for petitioner M/s Ali Raza Balouch and Saeed Ahmed Wasan AAGs Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General DSP Saeed Ahmed Bhayo, DSP/SDPO Mirwah and SIP Agha Abid SHO PS Bozdar Wada. ************** Respondents No. 5 & 6 are in attendance. They have submitted their respective statements/comments, which are taken on record. The official respondents have denied the allegations leveled against them and submit that they have neither caused any undue harassment to the applicant nor intend to do so. However, the official respondents are directed not to cause harassment to the applicant except in accordance with law and to provide him legal protection under the scheme of law. This order shall not affect any inquiry, investigation, or trial, if already pending against the applicant before any forum. Accordingly, the present petition stands disposed of. J U D G E M. Ali*
